name: Pineapple Drop Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the egg to the mixture and mix well.
3. Gradually add the crushed pineapple, sifted flour, salt, baking soda, and baking powder, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
4. Roll small amounts of the dough into 1/2 teaspoon-sized balls and place them on a cookie sheet.
5. Bake in an oven preheated to 375°F until golden brown.
Source: Florence Yohey, Tallmadge Grange, Summit County, OH
